product_description: an AI-powered marketing intelligence platform that helps growth teams optimize campaign performance and reduce wasted ad spend

product_metadata.pricing: Plans start at $799 per month. Teams spending over $50K/month on ads typically see full ROI within 30 days.
product_metadata.avg_waste_reduction: Teams recover an average of 15-30% of wasted ad spend within the first 60 days.
product_metadata.setup_time: Connects to Google, Meta, and LinkedIn in under 48 hours with no downtime.
product_metadata.case_study: A B2B SaaS team running $120K/month across three channels cut their cost-per-lead by 28% in the first month by eliminating audience overlap between retargeting and prospecting campaigns.

opening: Hi {prospect_name}, this is Jordan calling from PulseIQ. Quick question before I take up your time — roughly how much are you spending monthly across your ad channels right now?
value_propositions: For teams spending $5-10K monthly, we typically identify $750-$3K in monthly waste they can recover immediately by auditing audience overlap and budget allocation
PulseIQ connects all your ad channels into one dashboard so your team spends less time on manual reporting and more time acting on insights
We help teams identify underperforming audience segments and budget inefficiencies that don't show up in individual platform dashboards — often worth 15-30% of total ad spend

objection_handlers.price: I get it — budget's tight. Here's the thing: if we can identify even $750-$1K in monthly waste recovery based on your current spend, that covers the platform cost in the first month. Would it make sense to spend 15 minutes so I can show you what that might look like for your specific setup?
objection_handlers.not_interested: I hear you. Just curious — are you currently tracking ROI across your different ad channels, or is that something your team struggles with?
objection_handlers.already_have_solution: That makes sense. A lot of teams use multiple tools. The difference with us is we're specifically built to spot inefficiencies across all your channels at once, not just within one platform. Would it hurt to do a quick 15-minute audit and see if there's anything you're missing?
objection_handlers.no_time: I totally understand. This would just be 15 minutes — I'd show you a quick overview of where most teams see waste, and you can decide if it's worth exploring further.
objection_handlers.need_approval: Of course. Would it help if I sent over some information you could share with them? Or better yet, I could set up a brief call with both of you so I can answer questions directly.
objection_handlers.data_privacy: We take data privacy seriously and are compliant with relevant regulations. Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties.
objection_handlers.too_small_for_platform: We actually work great with teams at your spend level. In fact, teams spending $5-10K monthly often find the biggest quick wins — usually $750-$3K in monthly waste recovery. Worth a quick look, yeah?

closing: Would it make sense to spend 15 minutes next week so I can show you exactly where teams like yours typically find waste in their setup?
